attrs.fact: On 4 February, 2023, Deborah explained how to perform the modified Warrior II pose, detailing the steps and benefits.
attrs.quote: Sure! To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted. Twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support. You'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles.
attrs.original_text:
